ConsultationSlot.title: ConsultationSlot
ConsultationSlot.description: A booking slot or approved consultation meeting for premium CRM strategic alignment clinic.

date.description: Date of the consultation in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startTime.description: HH:MM format for slot begin time.

endTime.description: HH:MM format for slot end time.

location.description: Physical, virtual room, or meet link where the session is hosted.

isBooked.description: Whether the slot is currently request-booked or locked.

bookedBy.description: Information about the user who booked this slot.

/consultation_slots/{slotId}.description: Contains metadata for available, pending, and scheduled consult appointments.
